warnings: This report is simulation readiness only.
Do not treat existing abstract gameflow artifacts as live simulation results.

gameplay_runtime.rule: requires core EFT gameplay runtime markers and the core-loop scene before local core-loop scenarios can be simulated

telemetry_emitter.rule: requires an actual gameplay/runtime emitter, not just telemetry schema validators

core_loop_simulation.scope: local core-loop rules in the generated test arena; real maps remain analysis/virtual-perception targets until converted into game/eft2 runtime scenes
core_loop_simulation.map_rule_refinement_note: Analyzed maps with virtual perception can guide rule coding and refinement, but the report must not claim live real-map simulation until a runtime scene/map exists.

blockers.message: Core-loop rules can be simulated in the test arena, but analyzed real maps are not converted into runtime scenes yet.

candidate_matrix.reason: Hoop/throw/slam route pressure needs map intelligence before runtime tests.
Flat open-field swarm is the cleanest full-gameplay feel benchmark.
Swarm collapse maps directly to Bloodbowl's open-field convergence.
Head-on speed duel can later validate charge/tackle readability on open layouts.
Goal-line stand validates preventability once goals and runtime telemetry exist.
